comments.body: Done. Corrected gate-level 'three-pass' -> 'four-pass (find → verify → decide → coach)' in: passes.py:1, mcp_server.py:657, _cli/_llm_commands.py:215/225, schemas/plan_review_verdict.schema.json:5, llm/plan_review/__init__.py:10/48, attest.py:13, docs/plan-review-gate.md (header + lines 33/50/73/236). Disambiguated docs/reuse-surface.md:181 to 'three model-driven passes (find/verify/coach)'. Preserved intentionally: the 'shared three-pass framework (epic 9da1)' lineage (registry.py:53, plan-review-gate.md:73) and the reviewer prompt .md files (decision-core role; avoids the prompt-index drift gate). Verified: 382 plan_review/schema/prompt tests pass, ruff clean, schema JSON valid.

compiled_state.description:
## What
The plan-review gate runs FOUR passes (find → verify → decide → coach; see `passes.py`), but several
surfaces describe the whole gate as a "three-pass (find → verify → decide) advisory coaching review",
undercounting the Pass-4 coach. Correct the gate-level descriptions to four-pass.

## Scope (gate-level descriptions — fix)
- `src/rebar/llm/plan_review/passes.py:1` headline
- `src/rebar/mcp_server.py:657` (review_plan docstring)
- `src/rebar/_cli/_llm_commands.py:215,225` (CLI help)
- `src/rebar/schemas/plan_review_verdict.schema.json:5` (schema description)
- `src/rebar/llm/plan_review/__init__.py:10,48`, `attest.py:13`
- `docs/plan-review-gate.md` (header + body "the three passes" labels)

## Out of scope (preserve)
- The "shared three-pass framework (epic 9da1)" lineage — that framework IS three-pass and is shared.
- The reviewer prompt `.md` files (`plan_review_finder.md`/`plan_review_verifier.md`) — they name the
  decision core, and editing them risks the prompt-index drift gate.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] All gate-level "three-pass" descriptions read "four-pass (find → verify → decide → coach)".
- [ ] The shared-three-pass-framework (epic 9da1) lineage reference is preserved.
- [ ] No reviewer prompt `.md` front-matter is changed (drift gate untouched).
- [ ] `make lint` + test suite pass.
compiled_state.title: Docs: correct mislabeled 'three-pass' plan-review references to four-pass (find->verify->decide->coach)
